blocks.title: The challenge
paragraphs: Aurora Logistics runs 24 distribution sites across Italy and the DACH region. Plant managers only found out about costly downtime when the monthly report landed — by then, the money was already lost.
Leadership needed real-time visibility without a multi-year IT project or new hardware on the line.

blocks.title: The solution
paragraphs: Kite Analytics connected Aurora's existing PLCs and MES in under two weeks per site, turning raw plant signals into a live cost-of-downtime dashboard.
bullets: Alerts routed automatically to the on-duty shift lead
A weekly digest replaced the monthly spreadsheet ritual
Rollout completed across all 24 sites in ten weeks

items.label: downtime cost avoided in the first two quarters
to roll out across all 24 sites

blocks.quote: Kite gave every plant manager the number they used to wait a month for — in real time. It changed how fast we can act.
blocks.author: Giulia Conti
